title: rubus inceps
intro: Rubus inceps, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus inceps include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
